overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a character in a long dark coat and hat traversing a misty, rain-soaked wilderness. The character wades through a shallow river, crosses rocky terrain, and follows a muddy forest trail before encountering horseback riders in the dense pine woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing in forest valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow river water toward the opposite bank, with water reaching ankle height

entered.detail: clear shallow river with visible rocky bottom and gentle current
scattered boulders and rocks throughout the riverbed
dense coniferous forest shrouded in fog and rain
small waterfall cascading down rocky hillside through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a shallow, clear river surrounded by large rocks and boulders. Misty forest lines the banks with a small waterfall visible in the distance through the hazy, rain-soaked atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank transitioning to forest trail

events.description: character exits the river onto the rocky shoreline

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water and walking across rocky terrain toward the tree line, transitioning from water to land

entered.detail: gravel and stone covered bank at the river's edge
large rocks and stones scattered across the shoreline
tall evergreen trees marking the forest boundary

segments.scene_description: Leaving the river, the character traverses a rocky shoreline scattered with stones and boulders. The terrain gradually rises toward a dense pine forest as the character approaches the tree line, with the river now visible behind to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy forest trail ascending through dense pines

events.description: two riders on horseback appear ahead on the trail, moving toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking up a muddy forest path and passing two horseback riders moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback moving toward the camera along the muddy trail

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding uphill through the forest, wet from rain
thick overhead cover of pine branches blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: The character follows a winding muddy path through dense pine forest with thick canopy overhead. Two riders on horseback appear ahead moving in the opposite direction, and are passed as the character continues ascending the rain-soaked trail deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty riverbed that gradually ascends into a dense, rain-soaked pine forest. It begins with the character wading through a shallow, clear river surrounded by boulders, with a small waterfall visible through the hazy atmosphere. As the character leaves the water, the scene shifts to a rocky shoreline where the terrain rises steadily toward a looming tree line. The camera then follows the character onto a winding muddy path, moving under a thick canopy of pines as the open river fades into the distance. Finally, the trail leads deeper into the woods, passing two riders on horseback moving in the opposite direction as the ascent continues.
